'''ây-p-b''' ('''yapaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vom|vom]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vom|vom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-p-b
|-
! Lemma
| yapaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yapabithi|yapabithi]] || [[word:yapabiji|yapabiji]] || [[word:yapabishi|yapabishi]] || [[word:yapabi|yapabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yapabuthuth|yapabuthuth]] || [[word:yapabujuj|yapabujuj]] || [[word:yapabushush|yapabushush]] || [[word:yapab|yapab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yapabuthu|yapabuthu]] || [[word:yapabuju|yapabuju]] || [[word:yapabushu|yapabushu]] || [[word:yapabu|yapabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yapabufuth|yapabufuth]] || [[word:yapabufuj|yapabufuj]] || [[word:yapabufush|yapabufush]] || [[word:yapabuf|yapabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yapabethe|yapabethe]] || [[word:yapabeje|yapabeje]] || [[word:yapabeshe|yapabeshe]] || [[word:yapabe|yapabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yapabothoth|yapabothoth]] || [[word:yapabojoj|yapabojoj]] || [[word:yapaboshosh|yapaboshosh]] || [[word:yapab|yapab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yapabotho|yapabotho]] || [[word:yapabojo|yapabojo]] || [[word:yapabosho|yapabosho]] || [[word:yapabo|yapabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yapabofoth|yapabofoth]] || [[word:yapabofoj|yapabofoj]] || [[word:yapabofosh|yapabofosh]] || [[word:yapabof|yapabof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yapabĂŻfĂŻf|yapabĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻfĂŻf|yapabĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻfĂŻf|yapabĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻfĂŻf|yapabĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]] || [[word:yapabĂŻf|yapabĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yapabĂŠthĂŠ|yapabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yapabĂŠjĂŠ|yapabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yapabĂŠshĂŠ|yapabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yapabĂŠ|yapabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yapabathath|yapabathath]] || [[word:yapabajaj|yapabajaj]] || [[word:yapabashash|yapabashash]] || [[word:yapab|yapab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yapabatha|yapabatha]] || [[word:yapabaja|yapabaja]] || [[word:yapabasha|yapabasha]] || [[word:yapaba|yapaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yapabafath|yapabafath]] || [[word:yapabafaj|yapabafaj]] || [[word:yapabafash|yapabafash]] || [[word:yapabaf|yapabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yapabasha|yapabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyapabasha|goyapabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyapabasha|gokiyapabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yapabnĂŒsha|yapabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyapabnknĂŒsha|goyapabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyapabnĂŒsha|gokiyapabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yapabshĂ«sha|yapabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyapabnkshĂ«sha|goyapabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyapabshĂ«sha|gokiyapabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yapabrosha|yapabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyapabnkrosha|goyapabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyapabrosha|gokiyapabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yapabmusha|yapabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyapabnkmusha|goyapabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyapabmusha|gokiyapabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yapabsherasha|yapabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyapabnksherasha|goyapabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyapabsherasha|gokiyapabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yapabngasha|yapabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyapabnkngasha|goyapabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyapabngasha|gokiyapabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yapabyasha|yapabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyapabnkyasha|goyapabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyapabyasha|gokiyapabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yapabyamasha|yapabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyapabnkyamasha|goyapabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyapabyamasha|gokiyapabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yapabnĂŒshĂ«sha|yapabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyapabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyapabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyapabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyapabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yapabnĂŒrosha|yapabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyapabnknĂŒrosha|goyapabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyapabnĂŒrosha|gokiyapabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yapabnĂŒmusha|yapabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyapabnknĂŒmusha|goyapabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyapabnĂŒmusha|gokiyapabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yapabshĂ«nĂŒsha|yapabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyapabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyapabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyapabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyapabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yapabshĂ«rosha|yapabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyapabnkshĂ«rosha|goyapabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyapabshĂ«rosha|gokiyapabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yapabshĂ«musha|yapabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyapabnkshĂ«musha|goyapabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyapabshĂ«musha|gokiyapabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yapabronĂŒsha|yapabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyapabnkronĂŒsha|goyapabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyapabronĂŒsha|gokiyapabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yapabroshĂ«sha|yapabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyapabnkroshĂ«sha|goyapabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyapabroshĂ«sha|gokiyapabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yapabromusha|yapabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyapabnkromusha|goyapabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyapabromusha|gokiyapabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yapabmunĂŒsha|yapabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyapabnkmunĂŒsha|goyapabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyapabmunĂŒsha|gokiyapabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yapabmushĂ«sha|yapabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyapabnkmushĂ«sha|goyapabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyapabmushĂ«sha|gokiyapabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yapabmurosha|yapabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyapabnkmurosha|goyapabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyapabmurosha|gokiyapabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yapab|yapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠpĂŠb|yĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyapab|hoyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠpĂŠb|hoyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyapab|hohoyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠpĂŠb|hohoyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyapab|nĂŒyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠpĂŠb|nĂŒyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyapab|nĂŒnĂŒyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠpĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyapab|nĂŻyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠpĂŠb|nĂŻyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyapab|nĂŻnĂŻyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠpĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyapab|luyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠpĂŠb|luyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyapab|luluyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠpĂŠb|luluyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyapab|liyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠpĂŠb|liyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyapab|liliyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠpĂŠb|liliyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyapab|koyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠpĂŠb|koyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyapab|kokoyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠpĂŠb|kokoyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyapab|keyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠpĂŠb|keyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyapab|kekeyapab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠpĂŠb|kekeyĂŠpĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
